title: lotus nummularius
intro: Lotus nummularius, also known as the coin lotus, is a plant species in the family Nelumbonaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lotus nummularius include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine preparations, including powders and tablets.
